subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-05-23
subcodes.first_line: Blessed audience, I am overjoyed to be with you here today. It had been my hope to visit this University, and now that hope has been fulfilled
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای انجمن مبارک بینهایت مسرورم از اینکه در این جمعیت دارالفنون حاضر شده ام
subcodes.subjects: @high station of learning, @East and West; communication between East and West, @oneness; unity of religion, @present and future expansion of arts and sciences; of technology, @power of the mind over nature, @transcending the material condition
